flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tri-County Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.4k → $2.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tri-County Community College fell 100% between 2019 and 2022 (22.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tri-County Community College rose 46% between 2006 and 2009 (26.2% → 38.2%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Tri-County Community College fell 37% between 2013 and 2016 ($9.5k → $6.0k).
